seo.title: Wholesale Custom Sign Fabrication — Trade Pricing | Sunlite Signs
seo.metaDescription: Wholesale custom sign fabrication for sign shops only. Bespoke illuminated signage, specialty materials, complex geometries. Trade pricing, we never sell retail. We never compete with you.

data.subtitle: When your project goes beyond standard products, our custom fabrication team brings it to life. Complex geometries, mixed materials, specialty illumination, and oversized installations — engineered and built to the same standards as our entire product line. Available exclusively to trade accounts.
data.image: Custom fabrication — large-scale bespoke illuminated sign in fabrication shop

items.title: Complex Geometries
items.description: Multi-plane letters, curved returns, tapered profiles, and three-dimensional sculptural forms. If your design challenges standard fabrication, we welcome it.

items.title: Specialty Illumination
items.description: Neon-look LED flex, RGB color-changing, programmable DMX control, edge-lit panels, backlit murals, and custom LED configurations beyond standard products.

items.title: Mixed Materials
items.description: Combinations of aluminum, stainless steel, brass, copper, acrylic, wood, stone, and composite materials in a single sign structure.

items.title: Oversized Fabrication
items.description: Large-format letters, building-scale installations, and multi-component sign systems that exceed standard product size ranges.

items.title: Engineering Support
items.description: Structural calculations, wind load analysis, and mounting engineering for complex installations. We provide the documentation you need for permitting.

items.title: Collaborative Process
items.description: We work directly with you and your client's design team to translate concepts into buildable, installable signage. From napkin sketch to shop drawings.

steps.title: Submit Your Concept
steps.description: Share whatever you have: architectural drawings, brand guidelines, rough sketches, reference photos, or just a description of what you need. We work with it all.

steps.title: Engineering & Trade Estimation
steps.description: Our team reviews your concept, identifies the optimal materials and construction methods, and provides a detailed wholesale trade quote with fabrication drawings.

steps.title: Shop Drawing Approval
steps.description: We produce detailed shop drawings showing materials, dimensions, illumination, mounting, and electrical specifications. You approve before we cut metal.

steps.title: Fabrication & QC
steps.description: Precision fabrication using the same German-engineered processes that define our standard product lines. Every custom project undergoes the same quality control.

steps.title: Crating & Delivery
steps.description: Custom crating for safe transit. We ship to your shop or direct to the job site. Installation guides and hardware included.

data.heading: Project Types We Handle
data.description: This is a sample of the custom project types our fabrication team handles regularly. If your project is not on this list, reach out — we have likely done something similar. All at wholesale trade pricing for sign shops.

blocks.label: Why Sunlite for Wholesale Custom Work

data.heading: Why Sunlite for Wholesale Custom Work
data.content: Custom fabrication requires a partner who combines engineering capability with manufacturing precision. That is exactly what our German engineering heritage delivers. Wholesale direct to sign shops — we never sell retail.
data.image: Sunlite fabrication shop — CNC equipment, welding stations, paint booth

data.heading: Ready to Get Started?
data.description: Request a wholesale quote for your next project.
